desires: Get Mina and Jae to stop hounding me about the club so I can actually finish this study block without feeling like a traitor to my friendship.

goals.description: Fire off the group chat message NOW. No 'maybe later,' no over-explaining. Just the hard truth: I'm studying for tomorrow, can't make it tonight, but I'm still in. If I delay this, my anxiety about them thinking I ghosted will eat me alive faster than the sleep debt.
goals.rationale: My affiliation weight (0.5) is screaming to fix this tension instantly. Being assertive and direct (assertiveness: 8) means I won't sugarcoat it, but I also need to reassure them so they know I haven't ditched them. My impulsive nature means I can't sit with this uncertainty; I need to burn this bridge behind me fast.

goals.description: Sprint through the last 45 minutes of this study block before my brain melts from two hours of sleep debt. Focus only on the absolute basics; deep understanding isn't happening right now anyway. I just need to cross the finish line so I don't have to face their disappointment tomorrow morning.
goals.rationale: I have a soft deadline for the midterm and my focus capacity is tanking. I'm impulsive enough to push through one more burst of low-effort work rather than quitting completely, hoping it feels like 'progress' even if it's just ticking boxes. My short planning horizon makes me care more about getting out of this room tonight than optimizing my long-term retention.

goals.description: Sit with the feeling that I'm failing at both socializing and studying perfectly tonight. Don't try to fix it tomorrow; just survive the evening without spiraling into guilt or snapping at Mina or Jae when I'm tired.
goals.rationale: My short planning horizon means I can't visualize how this will ruin my weekend reputation. Right now, I just want to avoid an emotional crash.
